# VoxBulk

VoxBulk is an AI assistant platform that automates conversations, workflows and
data collection for businesses. We build intelligent voice and messaging tools
that save teams time and deliver real insights.

## Live services

- CV upload & ATS — bulk CV ingestion, scoring and ranking against role requirements
- AI interview question generation — tailored questions per role and candidate
- Automated candidate scheduling — AI contacts candidates and books interviews
- AI-run voice interviews — fully automated voice interviews at scheduled times
- Results dashboard — scores, answers and highlights for hiring teams
- One-click final round booking — Cronofy / Calendly integration
- WhatsApp surveys — AI-built surveys, response collection, named or anonymous reports

- Homepage: /
- Contact / demo: /contact
- Privacy: /privacy
- Terms: /terms
